ocr_findings.description: Ruby annotations above 財務諸表 (ざいむしょひょう), 貸借対照表 (たいしゃくたいしょうひょう), 損益計算書 (そんえきけいさんしょ) visible in image; OCR captures the kanji text correctly but omits the furigana ruby — acceptable as ruby is supplementary
Illustration image (経営者 reading 成績表) replaced with img-0.jpeg placeholder; no text lost

reviewer_notes: 財務諸表と6つの利益 (Lesson 01-08) content page. All prose, bullet list of 3 financial statements, and the もう少し詳しく box text faithfully reproduced. Furigana omission is expected pipeline behavior and does not affect learning content integrity.
